---
title: Workshop - Reproducible Science  
subtitle: Methodological School - 3 R’s of Trustworthy Science
author: Margherita Calderan  
date: today
format:  
  html:  
    width: 1200
    theme: cosmo
date-format: long  
final-slide: true  
from: markdown+emoji  
incremental: true  
engine: knitr  
---

Here the slides:

-   [HTML](slide/repro-preschool.html)

-   [PDF](slide/repro-preschool.pdf)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Example of quarto: [output](slide/example-quarto.html)
